announcements.details: Read the commentary on the readings for the 12th Sunday in Ordinary Time.
announcements.title: Commentary: 12th Sunday in Ordinary Time

announcements.details: There will be TWO masses on Sunday, 21st June, 2026. Offertory will be led by the Tuesday borns and the St. Vincent De Paul Society. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: 12th Sunday in Ordinary Time

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Marriage School will reopen on Sunday, 5th July, 2026. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest
announcements.title: St Bakhita Marriage School

announcements.details: Catechesis for the Sacraments is ongoing. Baptism and First Communion classes for children aged 10 and above are held on Saturdays at 3:00pm. Confirmation classes are for those aged 15 and above, while adult classes take place on Sundays after the first Mass. Interested persons should register with the catechists, at the parish office.
announcements.title: Chatechism Classes

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: First Mass at 7:00am, Second Mass at 9:30am
